_comment: DJR section gallery mapping. Edit in Decap CMS -> DJR Photography -> Section Gallery Mapper. Map a webpage section to either a Photo Gallery App album ID or a Google Photos shared album URL. For Google Photos, use a public/shared album URL and set a cover image because the site cannot reliably read private Google Photos album contents without Google auth.

sections.label: David's Story
sections.title: David Behind the Lens
sections.description: A curated album for the personal story section.

sections.label: Featured Story
sections.title: Sideline Work
sections.description: Map this to a sports or sideline Photo Gallery App album.

sections.label: Eye to Eye / Creative Feature
sections.title: Eye to Eye Concepts
sections.description: Paste a shared Google Photos album URL here when there is a public concept-art album.

sections.label: About David
sections.title: About David
sections.description: Map this to a profile or behind-the-scenes album.
